scripts.build: pnpm -r --filter @earendil-works/pi-tui run build && pnpm -r --filter @earendil-works/pi-ai run build && pnpm -r --filter @earendil-works/pi-agent run build && pnpm -r --filter @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent run build
scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && pnpm run check:pinned-deps && pnpm run check:ts-imports && pnpm run check:shrinkwrap && tsgo --noEmit && pnpm run check:browser-smoke
scripts.version:patch: pnpm -r exec npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && pnpm install --lockfile-only
scripts.version:minor: pnpm -r exec npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && pnpm install --lockfile-only
scripts.version:major: pnpm -r exec npm version major --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && pnpm install --lockfile-only
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build && pnpm run check
